results.actual_figure: BE study of MTX oral tablet (R) vs SC pen (T) at 30 mg
results.v05_note: Likely SC pen curve (T); oral is lower ~430

results.reason: PD response curve (CD34+ cell counts), not PK; motixafortide is SC peptide, not oral
results.v05_note: v0.5 has TWO motixafortide entries labeled 'oral' at 1.25/1.0 mg with Cmax 67/3.3 ng/mL — CONTAMINATED, derived from PD figure misparse
results.v05_action: REMOVE both motixafortide entries from v0.5

results.reason: Simulated multi-dose steady-state sawtooth (160/80 mg oxycodone/naloxone)
results.v05_note: v0.5 has 3 naloxone entries at 20 mg oral — figure basis unclear, likely from other NDA pages

results.reason: Figure shows DIGOXIN (DDI victim) not netupitant; TEST=digoxin+netupitant, REF=digoxin alone
results.v05_note: v0.5 entry with Cmax 7.9 at 300 mg oral is digoxin data (7.9 μg/L ≈ digoxin), CONTAMINATED

results.reason: Multi-dose steady-state IR vs ER (baseline already 3000-4000 ng/mL before additional dose)
results.v05_note: v0.5 entry 400 mg Cmax 5809 — possibly correct for SS IR but not single-dose; note route convention

results.reason: Scatter plot of DDI effects (AUCR), not a C-t profile
results.v05_note: v0.5 entry 100 mg Cmax 2.0 ng/mL — nirmatrelvir real Cmax at 100 mg is ~1000 ng/mL, CONTAMINATED

results.reason: Figure shows 1,2-GDN (dinitroglycerin METABOLITE), not parent GTN; 0.8 mg sublingual
results.v05_note: v0.5 entry 'oral 6.5 mg' Cmax 1.1 — wrong route (should be sublingual) AND wrong dose (0.8 mg) AND wrong analyte (metabolite), TRIPLE CONTAMINATED
